name: cms125v6-breast-cancer-screening
description: CMS125v6 Breast Cancer Screening — recommends a screening mammogram for women aged 51-74 who have not had one within the last 27 months.

protocols.description: Identifies women 51-74 who are due for a screening mammogram and emits an Instruct recommendation. Excludes patients with prior bilateral mastectomy, two unilateral mastectomies, or one unilateral plus a Status-Post-L/R Mastectomy diagnosis.

meta.title: Breast Cancer Screening
meta.description: Women 50-74 years of age who have not had a mammogram to screen for breast cancer within the last 27 months.
references: American Cancer Society. 2010. Cancer Facts & Figures 2010. Atlanta: American Cancer Society.
National Business Group on Health. 2011. Pathways to Managing Cancer in the Workplace. Washington: National Business Group on Health.

U.S. Preventive Services Task Force (USPSTF). 2009. 1) "Screening for breast cancer: U.S. Preventive Services Task Force recommendation statement." 2) "December 2009 addendum." Ann Intern Med 151(10):716-726.
